findings.description: Section s4 (送信HTTP呼び出し) is missing hints for key annotation and class names that appear in the section content: @SystemRepositoryComponent, @ComponentRef, @ConfigValue, HttpProductRepository, SystemRepository. These are PascalCase class names and annotation names from the code examples in s4.
findings.source_evidence: Source contains: `@SystemRepositoryComponent`, `@ComponentRef("httpClient")`, `@ConfigValue("${api.product.url}")`, class `HttpProductRepository`, and `SystemRepository.get("httpclient")` in the 送信HTTP呼び出し section.

findings.description: Section s5 (SQLクエリ) is missing a hint for HikariDataSource (com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource), which appears as the concrete DataSource class being wrapped in the XML configuration example.
findings.source_evidence: Source data-source.xml example contains: `<component name="rawDataSource" class="com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource" autowireType="None">`
